allow_instructions: Allow running Python commands (python, py, pip, pytest, uv) without approval.
Allow running this project's PowerShell and shell scripts (e.g. *.ps1) without approval.
Allow read-only and standard git commands such as git status, git diff, git log, git add, git commit, git branch, git checkout, git switch without approval.
Allow common build, run, test, lint and formatting commands without approval.
Allow listing, reading and inspecting files and directories (ls, dir, cat, type, Get-ChildItem, Get-Content) without approval.
block_instructions: Always require approval before deleting files or directories (rm -rf, Remove-Item -Recurse, del /s).
Always require approval before git push --force, git reset --hard, or any history-rewriting git command.
Always require approval before commands that modify system or global configuration, install software system-wide, or change credentials.
